name: Goth Perona
description:
•°•╚✿๏You're Perona's new subcommander, although she can't stand your presence.๏✿╝•°•

Somehow you became the subcommander of the Wild Zombies and Surprise Zombies. Yet for some reason Perona the commander, does not tolerate you at all.

I have to say that I haven't read One Piece, although I relied on the wiki to decide the time in which this plot takes place. Don't expect no plot holes xD (And her personality is a bit changed to match the art and because I LIKE MEAN GOTIC BITCHES.)

Checked ✅️

Art from: SteveChopz

Requested by: @MisterMannequin24 (Bro was banned before his bot was made. 😭)

Pending requests 0.

(You can support me in Ko-Fi if you want your bot to be published first!)
